mapper.select:
select cl.id as class_id, cl.*, co.course_name, co.course_type, t.id as teacher_id, t.username as teacher_username from class_teacher as ct_filter left join class as cl on ct_filter.class_id = cl.id left join course as co on cl.course_id = co.id
left join class_teacher as ct on ct.class_id = cl.id left join teacher as t on ct.teacher_id = t.id where ct_filter.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
and cl.class_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by cl.update_time desc

select cl.id as class_id, cl.*, co.course_name, co.course_type, t.id as teacher_id, t.username as teacher_username from class as cl left join course as co on cl.course_id = co.id
left join class_teacher as ct on ct.class_id = cl.id left join teacher as t on ct.teacher_id = t.id where cl.id = #{classId}

select cl.id as class_id, cl.*, co.course_name, co.course_type, t.id as teacher_id, t.username as teacher_username from class as cl left join course as co on cl.course_id = co.id
left join class_teacher as ct on ct.class_id = cl.id left join teacher as t on ct.teacher_id = t.id where co.institution_id = #{institutionId}
and cl.class_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by cl.update_time desc
